nl_query: Which boards have honorarium summaries computed but not yet approved, and what is the total pending honorarium amount per board broken down by evaluator role?
failed_sql:
SELECT b.id AS board_id, b.name AS board_name, SUM(hs.final_amount) AS total_pending_honorarium, hs.role_in_board AS evaluator_role
FROM board b
JOIN honorarium_summary hs ON b.id = hs.board_id
JOIN faculty_cache fc ON fc.employee_id = hs.employee_id
WHERE hs.approval_status = 'PENDING'
GROUP BY b.id, b.name, hs.role_in_board
ORDER BY total_pending_honorarium DESC
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): board.name, board.name. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
